வான் வருவான் தொடுவான்

மர்மம் அறிவான்
என்னுள் ஒளிவான்
அருகில் நிர்மிர்வான்
தொலைவில் பணிவான்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vaan Varuvaan?

The song Vaan Varuvaan expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of the characters in Kaatru Veliyidai.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kaatru Veliyidai, this song reflects the romantic journey of the protagonists, highlighting their emotional connection.

Who is the singer of Vaan Varuvaan?

The song is beautifully sung by Shashaa Tirpathi, showcasing her vocal prowess.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vaan Varuvaan was composed by the legendary AR Rahman, known for his innovative soundscapes.

When was Vaan Varuvaan released?

Vaan Varuvaan was released on February 5, 2017, as part of the movie Kaatru Veliyidai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaan Varuvaan, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and yearning, beautifully encapsulated through Shashaa Tirpathi's soulful voice. The song serves as a poignant backdrop to the romantic narrative of Kaatru Veliyidai, where emotions run high amidst the complexities of relationships. With AR Rahman's enchanting composition and Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics, the song resonates with anyone who has experienced love's bittersweet moments. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaan Varuvaan from Kaatru Veliyidai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Shashaa Tirpathi's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romantic dreams. Experience the beauty of Vairamuthu's lyrics that resonate with deep emotions and poetic imagery.
stanzaMeanings: The sky will come, will come, will come.
The sky will come, the sky will come.
The sky will come, it will start like rain, it will fall like rain, it will know the secret, it will be a light in my heart, it will be close, it will be a work in the shadows.
If pride comes, it will speak like a thief, it will speak, it will speak.
When love comes, it will fall like a fruit, my beloved will come.
The sky will come, it will start like rain, it will fall like rain, it will know the secret, it will be a light in my heart, it will be close, it will be a work in the shadows.
If pride comes, it will speak like a thief, it will speak, it will speak.
How much she thinks of me when she is with me, she thinks of me.
If I forget, it will open me up, if I forget me, it will take my life away.
When the eyes close, it will spread like light, when the eyes open, it will be in the eyes.
The sky will come, it will start like rain, it will fall like rain, it will know the secret, it will be a light in my heart, it will be close, it will be a work in the shadows.
If pride comes, it will speak like a thief, it will speak, it will speak.
When love comes, it will fall like a fruit, it will fall, it will fall, it will fall.
